rationale: Both reviews correctly block on the premature True-stub Layer-6 classes and early IsUnipotent; Review 1 additionally gives clear, actionable guidance to preserve the legitimate Layer-0 material (AffineAlgGroup, AlgPoints) in a split PR. Review 2's extra finding — that AffineAlgGroup violates a 'do not bundle' rule — is unverifiable from the diff and likely wrong (bundling Prop fields in a Prop class is standard Lean/Mathlib), so acting on it would waste effort or degrade valid foundations.
